description: USPTO is the United States Patent and Trademark Office. Its Open Data Portal provides public patent and trademark datasets, search tools, document access, and bulk data downloads.
summary: USPTO exposes HTTP APIs through its Open Data Portal, plus a public Bulk Data Storage System (BDSS) API with a published OpenAPI spec; ODP API access uses a personalized API key tied to a USPTO.gov account.

surfaces.name: USPTO Bulk Data Storage System (BDSS) API
